const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500215 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor && find data/cases/scotus/73500215 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500215 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor\nfind data/cases/scotus/73500215 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73500215/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml
sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73500215/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"^(INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|A\\.|B\\.|C\\.|The Petition|Petitioner|Respondent)|Nelson|Deorle|clearly established|circuit split|conflict|Response Requested|SUMMARY\" data/cases/scotus/73500215/record/documents/petition.txt | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.scotus_cert_by_term // .cert_by_term // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.sections | keys, .terms | keys' metrics/statpack.json\njq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq -r '.sections[] | [.title, .scope] | @tsv' metrics/statpack.json\njq '.terms[0]' metrics/statpack.json | tail -n 100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":15000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --era 2020s --limit 12","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|legal search|case law|opinion search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"scotus",q:"\"qualified immunity\" \"clearly established\" excessive force",filed_after:"2015-01-01",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"dateFiled desc",fields:["id","caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","snippet","status"],num_results:12});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"scotus",case_name:"Zorn v. Linton",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","docketNumber","opinions","syllabus","procedural_history"],num_results:5});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;
